welcome_offer.description: Unlimited Cashback Match: Discover automatically matches all the cash back earned at the end of the first year, with no minimum spending requirement and no cap stated on the issuer page.
notes: Discover it welcome offer is a first-year Cashback Match rather than a fixed points/cash bonus; set spend requirement to 0 and monitor issuer language for cap/minimum changes.

caveats: No fixed upfront signup bonus; value depends on first-year cash back earned.

welcome_offer: sources/*issuer*.md:no minimum spending or maximum rewards

open_questions: Confirm issuer Cashback Match wording before applying future changes, especially any cap/minimum language.

community.summary: Track Discover it Cash Back issuer-first for Cashback Match wording rather than fixed bonus amount.

observations.regex: Unlimited Cashback Match|first year|no minimum|no maximum|no cap
observations.excerpt: Discover describes the welcome offer as an automatic dollar-for-dollar Cashback Match at the end of the first year.
